questions.question: Explain the purpose of a Check Sum in a frame in the Point to Point Protocol. (10 marks)
A receiver of a frame in the Point to Point Protocol detects an error. What action does the receiver take to correct the error? (10 marks)
A Check Sum and Point to Point Protocol frame is transmitted over a channel that suffers from errors. What type of error correction technique can be used to detect and correct such errors? (5 marks)
